title: Story Duel — Storm at the library
description: Second narrative pack for swapping via STORY_DUEL_BUNDLE_ID or lesson notes.
subtitle: Swap stories by setting STORY_DUEL_BUNDLE_ID=storm_library_v1 or story_duel_bundle:storm_library_v1 in lesson notes.
passage: Rain hammered the library windows. Maya hugged her book bag and watched the librarian tape a handwritten sign to the door: "Closing early — weather." Outside, the wind howled. Maya realized her little brother was still at the rec center three blocks away.

rounds.title: Main Idea Strike
rounds.prompt: What is this scene mostly about?
rounds.rubric: Valid if the student captures bad weather closing the library and Maya realizing a problem (brother still out / needs to get him / worry about safety).

rounds.title: Inference Shield
rounds.prompt: What is Maya most likely going to do next? Use the text.
rounds.rubric: Valid if they infer she will leave to get her brother, call someone, or find a safe way to reach the rec center — not random guesses with no link to the passage.

rounds.title: Mood Finisher
rounds.prompt: What mood or feeling does the setting create? Point to one detail from the passage.
rounds.rubric: Valid if they name a mood (tense, urgent, scary, uneasy) and tie it to rain, wind, early closing, or the brother being away.
